name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 1am. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a low around 59. North wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
